Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family, COMT subfamily
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family. COMT subfamily. {ECO:0000255|PROSITE-ProRule:PRU01020}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=TRIBOA beta-D-glucoside + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = DIMBOA beta-D-glucoside + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:32099, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:37573, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:63671; EC=2.1.1.241; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:18192444};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: O-methyltransferase involved in the benzoxazinoid glucoside biosynthesis. Can use 2,4,7-trihydroxy-2H-1,4-benzoxazin-3(4H)-one 2-D-glucoside (TRIBOA-glucoside) as substrate, but not aglucone TRIBOA, caffeic acid, ferulic acid, apigenin or quercetin. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:18192444}.
